config.content.title: About PokerArena
config.content.description: Founded by poker enthusiasts, PokerArena was built to create the ultimate online poker experience — fair, fast, and player-first.
config.story.title: Our Story
config.story.content: PokerArena was founded in 2020 by a team of professional poker players and technology experts who believed online poker could be better. We set out to build a platform that combines cutting-edge technology with the authentic feel of live poker. Today, we serve over 500,000 active players across 50+ countries.
config.values.items:
Fair Play|Every hand is dealt with certified RNG technology. We maintain the highest standards of game integrity.
Player First|Our platform is designed around player needs — from intuitive UI to responsive support.
Responsible Gaming|We provide tools for self-exclusion, deposit limits, and session time reminders.
Innovation|We continuously invest in technology to deliver the smoothest poker experience possible.

notes: 关于页面布局，继承首页头尾
